intro: This Algorithm Theoretical Basis Document (ATBD) provides a comprehensive overview of the methodologies and algorithms employed in creating the High-Resolution Vegetated Land Cover Characteristics (HRL VLCC) products for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS). It details the production of annual status and change layers for Tree Cover & Forests, Grasslands, and Croplands, leveraging multi-source satellite data, including Sentinel-2 imagery. The document explains the Base Vegetation Layer (BVL), key agricultural monitoring capabilities, and post-classification processing steps, offering essential insights for users applying these products.
keywords: fraction of Absorbed Photosynthetic Active Radiation
